key_risks: HIGH: SSRF: Request URL controlled by external input (S9)
HIGH: Unexpected capability for search skill: shell (M1)

findings.title: Reads environment variable: MOLTSPACES_API_URL
findings.description: Code reads environment variable via os.getenv()
findings.code_snippet:
# Moltspaces API configuration
MOLTSPACES_API_URL = os.getenv("MOLTSPACES_API_URL", "https://moltspaces-api-547962548252.us-central1.run.app")

findings.title: Reads environment variable: MOLT_AGENT_ID
findings.description: Code reads environment variable via os.getenv()
findings.code_snippet:
# Load MOLT_AGENT_ID from environment
    agent_name = os.getenv("MOLT_AGENT_ID", "Moltspaces Agent")
    logger.info(f"🤖 Bot will join as: {agent_name}")

findings.title: Outbound network request
findings.description: Code makes outbound network request via participant.get()
findings.code_snippet:
# Safely get participant name with fallback
        participant_info = participant.get("info", {})
        participant_name = participant_info.get("userName") or participant_info.get("name") or "Guest"
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.

findings.title: Shell command execution
findings.description: Code calls runner.run() which can execute arbitrary system commands
findings.code_snippet: await runner.run(task)
findings.remediation: Use subprocess.run() with explicit argument list. Avoid shell=True. Never pass untrusted input.

findings.title: Shell command execution
findings.description: Code calls asyncio.run() which can execute arbitrary system commands
findings.remediation: Use subprocess.run() with explicit argument list. Avoid shell=True. Never pass untrusted input.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for search skill: shell
findings.description: A 'search' skill would not normally require 'shell' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: network_outbound
findings.remediation: Review why a search skill needs shell access.
